name: Evangelion x Minecraft
description:
Literally just for fun.

Thumbnail made by yours truly in Google Slides.

It has Asuka, Rei, and Misato. You take the place of Shinji.

Herobrine ain't here, but it would be kinda funny to add him with having the appearance of you and white eyes instead of Steve and white eyes.

This is a bad one that I made, don't expect it to be that great. At all. I remembered that a bot with I think some anime girls or some shit had them and the user waking up in Minecraft and just going from there.

Go out and have fun.
creator: Kazuya Sho
